name: Sunshine Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg yolks until stiff.
2. Add half the sugar, salt, lemon juice, and grated lemon rind to the egg yolks. Sift the flour and water into a measuring cup, then sift it into the mixture and carefully fold it in with the egg yolk mixture.
3. Whip egg whites until just frothy. Gradually add cream of tartar and water, whisking constantly until the whites form stiff peaks.
4. Carefully fold half the sugar into the egg white mixture. Fold this back into the flour mixture.
5. Pour the batter into an un-oiled tube pan and bake in a slow oven (325°F) for about 1 hour.
